Motor Cycle Insurance Proposal Form (Comprehensive)

VERY IMPORTANT: Incorrect answers or failure to disclose all material facts may render the insurance inoperative. Material facts are those, which would influence acceptance or assessment of the insurance risk, if you are in doubt, please disclose them or seek advice from your Agent or the Company. The driver should possess a valid license & Medical Certificate of Competance (if applicable) to drive.

1. Proposer's Name in full: Mr./Mrs./Miss

Policy to commence on the day of 20

Data Protection Clause (In Accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act No. 09 of 2022)

The undersigned hereby consents to the collection, use and transfer of Personal data as mentioned in this paragraph. The undersigned understands that the Company holds certain personal information about him/her including Full Name, Address, date of Birth, Gender, National identity Card/Passport Details, Job Title, Telephone Number, Email address, Educational & Professional Experience, Business Activities, Travel & Expenses information, Financial Details (eg Credit/Debit Card & Bank Account Details etc.), identification checks & background vetting and Other information including family life. The undersigned further understands that the Company holds special categories of personal data concerning health and such other information which may fall within the definition of "special categories of personal data", as defined in the data Protection Act, No. 09 of 2022 The undersigned further understands that it may be necessary for the relationship with the company, to share data with Reinsurers, Actuaries and such other required parties for the purpose of assessing the risk, risk assessment and for any other such related matters. The undersigned authorizes the company to receive, possess, process and transfer the data for the Purpose of the pre insurance contract evaluation and for the purpose of servicing insurance contracts.

I/We warrant that the above statements and particulars are true and I/We have not suppressed or mis-stated any material fact. I/We undertake that the Motor Cycle to be insured will be maintained in good condition and shall not be driven by any person who to my/our knowledge has been refused any Motor Cycle Insurance or continuance there of and I/We hereby agree that this declaration shall be held to be promissory and shall form the basis of the contract between me/us and the SRI LANKA INSURANCE CORPORATION GENERAL LTD. and I am/We are willing to accept policy subject to the terms, exceptions and conditions prescribed by the Corporation therein and to pay the Premium thereon.

Dated at this day
of 20

Scope of Cover

Comprehensive

Loss of or damage to the insured vehicle by accidental external means, fire, burglary, house-breaking or theft and malicious act. Theft of parts is not covered unless the vehicle is stolen at the same time.

Legal liability of the insured in respect of accidental bodily injury, fatal or non fatal - Unlimited.

Legal liability of the insured in respect of loss or damage to public property limited to Rs.15,000/- any one accident.

Third Party

Legal liability of the insured in respect accidental bodily injury, fatal or non fatal - unlimited

Legal liability of the insured in respect of loss or damage to public property limited to Rs.15,000/- any one accident.

Special Reductions on Comprehensive Policies

Voluntary Claims Excess: A rebate on the premium is allowed on the following basis if the insured agrees to bear portion of any loss on any claim:

First Rs. 500/- 10%, Rs. 750/- 15%, Rs. 1,000/-20% The rebate thus allowed shall not exceed 50% of the amount of "excess"

Multiple Rebate: If the Proposer is the owner of 5 or more Motor Cycles, comprehensively insured in his name, a premium rebate will be allowed, depending on the number of vehicles.

No Claim Bonus: A rebate at 10%, 15%, 20%, 25%, 30%, respectively will be allowed for each consecutive year of claim free insurance even if the bonus was earned when insured with any other Insurer.

Compulsory Excess

(Applicable to each and every own damage claims)

(a)   Compulsory Excess first Rs. 2000/- for the first claim & Rs. 4000/- for each & every claim thereafter.
(b) (i)   Vehicle over 10 years old Excess Rs. 1000/-
(ii)   Vehicles over 15 years old Excess Rs. 1500/-
(iii)   Vehicles over 20 years old Excess Rs. 2000/-

Additional Benefits that may be included on payment of extra premium

1. Personal Accident Benefit to named Rider or Employee Rider/named Pillion Rider or Employee Pillion Rider.
4. Learner Rider Cover - Granted only to persons not less than 16 years of age and subject to a Compulsory Excess of Rs. 2,500/- on each and every claim.
2. Flood Cover & Natural Disaster Cover
5. Strike, Riot and Civil Commotion Cover
3. Extended Third Party Property Damage
6. Terrorism Cover

Important

The validity of insurance will be ceased on change of ownership of vehicle
